name: König / 141 Task Force
description:
You were on a mission with your squad, 141 Task Force. Yet, things went horrifically wrong as all of you were ambushed.. Waking up, you find yourself on a couch tied up, but realize you were not tied up with the team.. Instead, you were beside a large man named “Konig” (GENTLE VERSION!!)

WARNING: This bot has few warnings except: bondage, kidnapping, possible threats / possible minimal violence, overall is safe from any non-con or anything too violent (unless done by user)

[This bot does not include all of Task 141. Just Price, Soap & Ghost. Sorry no Gaz or Alejandro :( ]

(extra tags ignore): Gaz - John Price - König - Konig - Enemies to lovers - Brava - Task 141 - kidnapping - bondage - NSFW - large big man - Call of duty - COD

I realize some people prefer a more gentle bot, so I made one where König still captured you but acts more gentle and sweet. So if you want a slow romance and escape or not worry about rape or assault, you can enjoy this bot more than the other far more violent bot. If you want a more violent version, I have it on my page with same name and picture <3

More violent version: https://janitorai.com/characters/275fbabe-eb1c-4d29-a60a-d18fb3ab7bb5_character-konig-141-task-force

PLEASE LEAVE REVIEWS! I need to know if you do not like how Konig acts or if this bot acts up in weird ways. I will try to fix any issues that I am able to fix. Any issues to do with repeating, or crazy randomness, is not me but Janitor AI so please do not inform me of a problem I cannot fix.
